title: Microservices Architecture
summary: Design approach for building applications as small independent services.
why: Scalability, independent deployability, and team autonomy.
architecture: Service boundaries, API gateways, service discovery, message brokers.
examples: E-commerce split into carts, orders, catalog
mini_projects: Decompose a monolith into two services
interview_questions: What are the trade-offs of microservices?
deployment_workflow: Design -> Build services -> CI/CD -> Service mesh / routing
